	<li id="menu-item-11943" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-11943"><a href="https://retroonly.com/category/vinyl-records/">Vinyl Records</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li id="menu-item-12879" class="menu-item menu-item-type-custom menu-item-object-custom menu-item-has-children menu-item-12879"><a><span>Sega</span><span class="toggle-sub-menu"><svg class="icon-arrow-down" width="6" height="4" viewBox="0 0 6 4" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M3 3.5L0 0L6 0L3 3.5Z" fill="#41A4A9"></path></svg></span></a>
<ul class="sub-menu">
	<li id="menu-item-11801" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-11801"><a href="https://retroonly.com/category/sega-faqs/">Sega FAQs</a></li>
	<li id="menu-item-11783" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-11783"><a href="https://retroonly.com/category/sega-genesis/">Sega Genesis</a></li>

</ul>
</li>
<li id="menu-item-12263" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-12263"><a href="https://retroonly.com/category/xbox/"><span>Xbox</span></a></li>
</ul></nav>	</div>
</div>
		</div>
			</div>
</header>
					</div>
		
	<!-- Main Content Section -->
	<div class="content">
		<div class="wrapper wrapper-content">
						<main id="content" class="content-container">

		<div class="featured-hero-post-data excerpt-post-data">
			<h1 class="featured-hero-title excerpt-title">
				<a href="https://retroonly.com/how-we-started/" class="featured-hero-link excerpt-link">How We Started</a>
			</h1>
						<div class="featured-hero-excerpt excerpt-excerpt"><p>Retro Only was started as a resource to help people just like you get the answers to their questions about retro Music, arcade machine, video game consoles, toys, board games, and more. Over the years we have expanded to include some more modern products but have tried to keep the retro theme. Hi, I&rsquo;m Matt &hellip;</p>
</div>
			<a href="https://retroonly.com/how-we-started/" class="article-read-more button featured-hero-btn btn">Read More<span class="screen-reader-text"> about How We Started</span></a>
		</div>
	</div>
</article>

			</div>
		
		<div class="excerpt-post-data">
			<h2 class="excerpt-title"><a href="https://retroonly.com/downloadable-nintendo-game-can-you-download-games-on-nintendo-switch/" class="excerpt-link">Downloadable Nintendo Game: Can You Download Games On Nintendo Switch?</a></h2>
			<div class="excerpt-excerpt">
				<p>If you are considering getting a Switch console or you just got one you might be wondering how you can get games onto it. I mean sure you can buy Switch game cartridges but no one wants to have to go to the store (or wait for it to be delivered from an online store). &hellip;</p>
			</div>

			<a href="https://retroonly.com/downloadable-nintendo-game-can-you-download-games-on-nintendo-switch/" class="button article-read-more">Read More<span class="screen-reader-text"> about Downloadable Nintendo Game: Can You Download Games On Nintendo Switch?</span></a>
		</div>
			</div>

				<p>if you are in the process of purchasing a Nintendo Switch you might be wondering exactly what it comes with. Does the Nintendo Switch include an SD card with the console? 			<div class="excerpt-excerpt">
				<p>The Nintendo Switch Lite is a version of the Nintendo Switch that is just a handheld console. So this brings us to our question, do Nintendo Switch games work on the Switch &hellip;</p>

			<h2 class="excerpt-title"><a href="https://retroonly.com/are-jukeboxes-expensive/" class="excerpt-link">Are Jukeboxes Expensive? (Are Expensive Jukeboxes Worth It?)</a></h2>

				<p>Are you feeling the itch to add some retro cool to your home or business? 			<h2 class="excerpt-title"><a href="https://retroonly.com/are-switch-controllers-compatible-with-the-wii-u-are-any/" class="excerpt-link">Are Nintendo Switch Joy-Cons (Or Pro Controllers) Compatible With The Wii U?</a></h2>

				<p>The Nintendo Switch is one of Nintendo&lsquo;s best-selling gaming consoles as it is able to be used on the go and at your house. 		<div class="excerpt-post-data">
			<h2 class="excerpt-title"><a href="https://retroonly.com/is-rummikub-the-same-as-rummy/" class="excerpt-link">Rummy Vs Rummikub: Are They The Same? (What&#8217;s The Difference?)</a></h2>
			<div class="excerpt-excerpt">
				<p>Have you ever heard someone say that Rummikub was the same as the card game Rummy? Maybe you are wondering how this can be, or if it is even true. Well, in this article we will go over everything you need to know about Rummikub and Rummy.&nbsp; So is Rummikub the same as Rummy? Although &hellip;</p>
			</div>

			<a href="https://retroonly.com/is-rummikub-the-same-as-rummy/" class="button article-read-more">Read More<span class="screen-reader-text"> about Rummy Vs Rummikub: Are They The Same? (What&#8217;s The Difference?)</span></a>
		</div>

</article>

	<div class="excerpt-container">

				<a href="https://retroonly.com/how-many-reports-does-it-take-to-get-banned-on-xbox-live/" class="excerpt-link" title="What Happens When You Report Someone On Xbox Or Get Reported? 			</div>
		
		<div class="excerpt-post-data">
			<h2 class="excerpt-title"><a href="https://retroonly.com/how-many-reports-does-it-take-to-get-banned-on-xbox-live/" class="excerpt-link">What Happens When You Report Someone On Xbox Or Get Reported? (Reporting FAQ)</a></h2>
			<div class="excerpt-excerpt">
				<p>If you are a true game lover, then you will certainly know all about Xboxes and Xbox Live.&nbsp; The console is one of the two biggest console players in the USA and Xbox Live is how you can play virtually any game online with or against opponents around the world.&nbsp; People who love to play &hellip;</p>
			</div>

			<a href="https://retroonly.com/how-many-reports-does-it-take-to-get-banned-on-xbox-live/" class="button article-read-more">Read More<span class="screen-reader-text"> about What Happens When You Report Someone On Xbox Or Get Reported? (Reporting FAQ)</span></a>
		</div>
			</div>
</article>

	<div class="excerpt-container">
		
					<div class="excerpt-photo">

		<div class="excerpt-post-data">
			<h2 class="excerpt-title"><a href="https://retroonly.com/does-super-mario-bros-3-save/" class="excerpt-link">How To Save Super Mario 3 On NES Classic (Does It Save On The NES?)</a></h2>
			<div class="excerpt-excerpt">
				<p>If you are playing Super Mario 3 on the NES Classic console you are unlikely to want to play the entire game at one time. So you will want to save it part way through so you can come back to it when you have more time. But how exactly do you save Super Mario &hellip;</p>
			</div>

		</div>

</div><div id="block-3" class="mv_trellis_mobile_hide widget-container widget_block widget_text">
<p>Hi, my name is Matt Robbs. My wife and I are huge retro enthusiasts and love anything and everything retro.</p>
</div><div id="block-4" class="mv_trellis_mobile_hide widget-container widget_block widget_text">
<p>We love sharing our hobby with friends and family but I know that they get tired of it so we decided to make this blog.</p>
</div><div id="block-5" class="mv_trellis_mobile_hide widget-container widget_block widget_text">
<p>We figured if we overshared online at least we would stop annoying our friends! I hope you enjoy the site and learn something new about the Retro community.</p>
</div><div id="block-6" class="mv_trellis_mobile_hide widget-container widget_block widget_text">
<p>You can learn more about us and our family&nbsp;<a href="https://retroonly.com/about-us/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">here.</a></p>
